title: Add offline session attach dry-run JSON
goal: Add the next issue #4 headless runtime slice: `jcode-harness session attach <id> --dry-run --json`, a safe local attach envelope for external orchestrators.
requiredInputs: Existing jcode CLI supports `--resume <session_id>` as the current attach surface
permissions: Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build
completionConditions: Command validates a local jcode session and emits stable attach metadata/envelope without transcript content
Omitting `--dry-run` fails safely without starting TUI/provider
Focused e2e, fmt/check, selfdev build, commit and push pass
failureTaxonomy: Accidentally starting TUI/provider instead of dry-run
Duplicating resume semantics without clearly marking attach mode
Leaking transcript content in attach metadata
notes: Keep actual attach execution unsupported in this slice. The dry-run envelope may point to current jcode CLI resume as the available operator-selected execution surface, but must not execute it.
